raw_title: Book Review: ‘Seek the Traitor’s Son,’ by Veronica Roth
book_title: ‘Seek the Traitor’s Son,’ by Veronica Roth
description: In Veronica Roth’s “Seek the Traitor’s Son,” a soldier in a pandemic-ravaged world is forced to become the hope of her people.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘Nerve Damage,’ by Annakeara Stinson
description: “Nerve Damage,” by Annakeara Stinson, is a jittery psychological thriller about a woman whose creepy ex simply won’t leave her alone.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘AI for Good,’ by Josh Tyrangiel
description: In “AI for Good,” Josh Tyrangiel travels to the classrooms, hospitals and research labs where people are using artificial intelligence that might benefit society.
